root.name: Add subtitle 'A Comprehensive Study' to the title slide below the main title
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent has correctly added the subtitle 'A Comprehensive Study' to the title slide, placed it below the main title, and avoided extraneous changes.

children.name: Subtitle text presence on title slide
children.description: Checks that the subtitle 'A Comprehensive Study' exists as a text element on the first slide.

children.name: Subtitle text placement below main title
children.description: Checks that the subtitle appears below the main title on the title slide (visually, or by shape order/top coordinates).

children.name: No extraneous modifications
children.description: Checks that only the intended subtitle addition was performed, with no unrelated text, slide, animation, or transition changes.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: Ensures no slides were added or removed except possibly a subtitle shape.

children.name: No extraneous text changes on title slide
children.description: Ensures that text changes on the title slide are only related to the subtitle addition.

children.name: No animations or transitions added to title slide
children.description: Ensures no new animations or transitions have been added to the title slide.

metadata.task: In the title slide, add a subtitle 'A Comprehensive Study' below the main title
